name: agent-todo-list
description: Local-first, CRDT-backed todo/project management for AI coding agents

scripts.dev: bash -c 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; src/cli/target/debug/agt serve & until curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/project > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; cd src/web && bunx vite'
scripts.build: cd src/cli && cargo build --release && bun run --cwd src/web build-only
